text: For the geophysical-survey package (SR Section J) we recommend Sixense Limited at HK$240,340, the lowest-priced compliant offer. The competing bid, Geotechnics & Concrete Engineering (Hong Kong) Limited, is higher at HK$327,100. Against the tender's own scheduled rates on the same quantities (HK$715,230) Sixense is about a third of the benchmark, driven by far lower survey and interpretation rates — ground penetrating radar at HK$10/m versus the scheduled HK$140/m, and resistivity interpretation at HK$80/point versus HK$320. The one place Sixense sits above benchmark is mobilisation (J5): HK$125,980 for the two equipment set-ups against the scheduled HK$55,330, a premium that is still far outweighed by the survey savings over the measured quantities. Sixense's column is its real submitted rates; the competitor figures are representative, and the tender scheduled rates are shown only as a benchmark, not as a competing bid. A person approves the award.
